# Multiclass and Structured Decisions {#ch-multiclass}

<!-- DEVELOPMENT OUTLINE: original chapter contained only its title. -->

## From Binary to Multiple Classes

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/08-multiclass-and-structured-decisions.qmd#sec-pr-08-from-binary-to-multiple-classes)
to turn **From Binary to Multiple Classes** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## One-vs-Rest and One-vs-One Strategies

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/08-multiclass-and-structured-decisions.qmd#sec-pr-08-one-vs-rest-and-one-vs-one-strategies)
to turn **One-vs-Rest and One-vs-One Strategies** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Scores, Probabilities, and Softmax

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/08-multiclass-and-structured-decisions.qmd#sec-pr-08-scores-probabilities-and-softmax)
to turn **Scores, Probabilities, and Softmax** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Decision Trees and Rule-Based Decisions

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/08-multiclass-and-structured-decisions.qmd#sec-pr-08-decision-trees-and-rule-based-decisions)
to turn **Decision Trees and Rule-Based Decisions** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Multilabel and Ordinal Outcomes

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/08-multiclass-and-structured-decisions.qmd#sec-pr-08-multilabel-and-ordinal-outcomes)
to turn **Multilabel and Ordinal Outcomes** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Error Analysis and Calibration

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/08-multiclass-and-structured-decisions.qmd#sec-pr-08-error-analysis-and-calibration)
to turn **Error Analysis and Calibration** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Summary, Exercises, and Lab
